text: I have a bad productive cough — bringing up yellowish phlegm — and it hurts to breathe deeply. 10 day(s) like this.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: It hit me fast — fever, chills, splitting headache, muscle pain everywhere. Been in bed 9 day(s).
label: pneumonia/severe

text: High fever, bad body aches, shivering, exhausted. Classic flu, but quite rough — 8 day(s), and it feels like it might be turning a corner. My temperature is really elevated.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Gasping with each breath, sharp chest pain, high fever, thick productive cough. 8 day(s) now, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 3 day(s) — nothing terrible yet.
label: influenza/mild

text: I have a bad productive cough — bringing up yellowish phlegm — and it hurts to breathe deeply. 2 day(s) like this, and nothing is improving — I'm very worried.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Persistent cough with mucus and mild chest discomfort. Started 1 day(s) ago, and there's no sign of improvement.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I think I'm coming down with something — bit of a fever, muscle aches, dry cough, 8 day(s) now.
label: influenza/mild

text: My breathing is really laboured. Chest pain, high fever, can't stop coughing up phlegm. 7 day(s), deteriorating, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I feel rotten. Sudden high fever, severe body aches, dry hacking cough. 8 day(s) now, and it feels like it might be turning a corner. My temperature is really elevated.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I started with a cold but the cough has lingered — a bit of chest tightness too. 12 day(s). I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/moderate
